title: The Real Mechanics Behind Automated Ebook Delivery After Crypto Payment — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Selling ebooks, courses, templates, fonts, and digital downloads with automated delivery and crypto payments — no platform middleman required.

content.text: If you're a Kenyan digital creator, you know how frustrating it is to miss out on sales because of PayPal's restrictions. You've probably tried to use local payment gateways, but they come with their own set of fees and limitations. You've also heard about the promises of getting paid in crypto, but it seems like an overly complicated process. The truth is, there's a simpler way to sell your ebooks and courses without relying on PayPal or Stripe. It starts with understanding the mechanics behind automated ebook delivery after crypto payment. In this post, we'll break down the technology behind it and show you how to use it to start selling your digital products today.
What This Actually Is and Why It Matters

Automated ebook delivery after crypto payment refers to the process of selling digital products, like ebooks and courses, using cryptocurrency as the payment method. This technology enables creators to get paid instantly, without relying on traditional payment processors like PayPal or Stripe. What's more, it eliminates the need for a bank account or a PayPal account, making it accessible to creators in countries with restrictive payment systems. This is a game-changer for digital creators who want to reach a global audience without getting stuck in a web of payment restrictions.
How the Technology Works Under the Hood

The Core Shop Engine is the backbone of this technology. It's a software engine that integrates with the NOWPayments payment processor to enable automated ebook delivery. When a customer makes a payment in cryptocurrency, the Core Shop Engine verifies the payment and triggers the automated delivery of the ebook or course. The customer receives a PDF receipt, and the creator gets paid instantly. The entire process happens behind the scenes, without the need for human intervention or additional software.
Who This Is Built For and Why

This technology is built for digital creators who want to sell their ebooks and courses without relying on traditional payment processors. It's perfect for creators who live in countries with restrictive payment systems, or those who want to reach a global audience. With the Core Shop Engine, creators can sell their digital products with confidence, knowing that they'll get paid instantly and securely.
The Core Shop Engine is a game-changer for digital creators who want to reach a global audience without getting stuck in a web of payment restrictions.
The Components That Make It Work Together

The Core Shop Engine and NOWPayments payment processor are the two key components that make automated ebook delivery work. The Core Shop Engine handles the automated delivery of ebooks and courses, while NOWPayments handles the payment processing. When a customer makes a payment, the Core Shop Engine verifies the payment and triggers the automated delivery of the digital product. The entire process happens securely and efficiently, without the need for human intervention.
How to Use This Knowledge to Take Action

To start using this technology, you'll need to sign up for the Core Shop Engine and set up an account. Once you've done that, you can integrate the NOWPayments payment processor into your website. From there, you can create and sell your ebooks and courses using cryptocurrency as the payment method. With the Core Shop Engine, you'll be able to automate the delivery of your digital products and get paid instantly. This is a powerful tool for digital creators who want to reach a global audience and get paid for their work.
How do I sell an ebook online without PayPal?

What happens if I make a mistake and my customer doesn't receive their ebook or course? Don't worry, the Core Shop Engine has a robust logging system that tracks every transaction. If there's an issue, you can easily identify the problem and resolve it quickly. This means you can trust the technology to deliver your digital products to your customers, every time.
Automated ebook delivery is a powerful tool for creators who want to sell their digital products with confidence, knowing they'll get paid instantly and securely.
Related: How Creators Like You Are Getting Paid

If you're interested in learning more about automated ebook delivery, you might want to check out our resources on cryptocurrency pricing and web3 wallet integration. These topics are related to the Core Shop Engine, and understanding them can help you get the most out of this technology. With the right knowledge, you can sell your ebooks and courses with confidence, and reach a global audience.
Your Action Checklist

To start selling your ebooks and courses using automated ebook delivery, follow these steps: Sign up for the Core Shop Engine and set up an account. Integrate the NOWPayments payment processor into your website. Create and sell your ebooks and courses using cryptocurrency as the payment method. Automate the delivery of your digital products using the Core Shop Engine. Test your setup to ensure everything is working correctly. With these steps, you'll be able to get paid instantly and securely for your digital products.
The Core Shop Engine is built to be user-friendly, even for creators who are new to cryptocurrency and web3 technology.
Core Shop Engine — $49.99. Full backend with bot engine, automated delivery, payment verification, and PDF receipts. No payment processor account required. Works everywhere.
